name: Getting Your Car Ready for Winter

summary: Squealing, grinding, or a soft pedal? Here is what those symptoms mean and when to bring your car in for a brake inspection.

summary: Before the next heat wave, learn how to tell if your air conditioning needs a recharge or a quick repair to keep you cool.

summary: We bust a few myths about oil change intervals and explain what is right for the way you actually drive around Dearborn.

name: Road-Trip Readiness Checklist
summary: Planning a long drive this summer? Run through this quick checklist with us so you can hit the road with confidence.

name: Three Easy Habits That Make Your Car Last Longer
summary: Small routines - checking tire pressure, watching your fluids, and listening for new noises - go a long way toward a healthy car.
